name: kohlosseum
description: Kohlosseum — Claude Code Plugin Arena by blumenkohlbinary. Multi-Agent Pipelines, Document Fusion, Code Refactoring, AI-Powered Tooling.

plugins.name: tdo
plugins.description: TDO v11.2.4 — Dynamische verlustfreie Dokumentkompression und Multi-Dokument-Fusion mit 8-Stufen Multi-Agent Pipeline. 5 Skills, 10 Agents, Joplin-Formatierung (20 Techniken), CoVe-Verifikation, DARE-Text Merging.

plugins.name: refactoring
plugins.description: Universal Code Refactoring v2.1.0 — Diszipliniertes Refactoring fuer alle Programmiersprachen. Fowler Catalog, SOLID, Clean Code, DRY/KISS/YAGNI, Performance Anti-Patterns, Concurrency, Error Handling, Testing Quality, Architecture. 2 Skills, 8 Opus Agents (6 parallele Analyse-Spezialisten + Critic Synthesis + Refactoring Specialist), Confidence Scoring (0-100), NASA/CERT/MISRA Standards, 8-Point Verification Gate.

plugins.name: deep-review
plugins.description: Deep Code Review v1.0.0 — 31 checks across 8 categories for all programming languages. OWASP Top 10, CWE taint analysis, performance anti-patterns (N+1, O(n2), Blocking I/O), concurrency issues (TOCTOU, Deadlock), resilience defects (Resource Leak, Swallowed Exception), API design, testing quality, architecture analysis. 8 parallel Sonnet specialist agents synthesized by an Opus Critic-Agent with confidence scoring (0-100) and false-positive filtering.

plugins.name: claude-mind-manager
plugins.description: Claude Mind Manager v2.0.2 — Comprehensive context management for Claude Code with quality scoring (0-100 + A-F grading), CLAUDE.md generation from templates, natural language search, auto-learnings via Korrektur-Flywheel, and session summaries. 11 skills, 5 agents, 5 lifecycle hooks. Solves 8 community pain points: MEMORY.md overflow, rules silently ignored (paths: bug), no context overview, contradictions, cross-project knowledge loss. SFEIR compliance prognosis, token budget optimization. Zero external dependencies.
